Home › Services

Our services

Compliance and advisory services for businesses and individuals in Mumbai. Choose a service to see the process, documents, and timelines.

GST Registration

End-to-end GST registration for Mumbai businesses, handled by Chartered Accountants. Contact us for a quote.

Learn more ›

Income Tax Filing

ITR preparation and filing for individuals and businesses in Mumbai by Chartered Accountants. Contact us to file.

Learn more ›

Company Incorporation

Private limited, LLP and OPC incorporation in Mumbai, end to end, by Chartered Accountants. Contact us to start.

Learn more ›

Audit & Assurance

Statutory, tax and internal audit and assurance for Mumbai businesses by Chartered Accountants. Contact us.

Learn more ›

Business Advisory

Tax planning, transaction support, due diligence and CFO services for Mumbai businesses. Contact us.

Learn more ›

GST Return Filing

Monthly, quarterly and annual GST return filing (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9) for Mumbai businesses. Contact us.

Learn more ›

TDS Return Filing

TDS computation, payment and quarterly return filing (Form 24Q, 26Q) for Mumbai businesses. Contact us.

Learn more ›

Tax Litigation Support

Support for direct and indirect tax notices, assessments and appeals in Mumbai. Strategy, drafting, representation. Contact us.

Learn more ›

Accounting & Outsourcing

Outsourced bookkeeping, payroll and compliance for Mumbai businesses, handled by Chartered Accountants. Contact us.

Learn more ›
DPS & Co, Chartered Accountants

Tax, audit, assurance and advisory services for businesses and individuals across Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai. Established 2016.
